title: Reviewer Chains v1
description: Declarative reviewer-chain wiring per request type and gate (TDD-020 §6, SPEC-020-2-01). Extended by SPEC-REQ-000050 to add configurable timeouts.

defaults.description: Top-level default timeout applied to all reviewers unless overridden by gate_defaults or per-entry timeout_ms. (SPEC-REQ-000050)

request_types.description: Map of request type (feature|bug|infra|refactor|hotfix) to a per-gate reviewer chain.

timeout_ms.description: Default subprocess wall-clock cap in milliseconds for all reviewers. Overridden by gate_defaults and per-entry timeout_ms.

GateDefaultsMap.description: Per-gate timeout overrides. Each key is a gate name; the value is an object with optional timeout_ms.

timeout_ms.description: Subprocess wall-clock cap in milliseconds for all reviewers in this gate.

RequestType.description: Map of gate name (e.g., code_review, pre_merge, post_deploy) to an ordered reviewer entry list. Gate names match ^[a-z_]+$ (excluding the reserved key gate_defaults). gate_defaults is a sibling key for per-gate timeout overrides. (SPEC-REQ-000050: lookahead pattern used because gate_defaults matches ^[a-z_]+$ — the exclusion is necessary to prevent the patternProperties schema from treating gate_defaults as a ReviewerEntry array. Ajv 8+ supports ECMAScript-style negative lookaheads.)

gate_defaults.description: Per-gate timeout overrides. Sibling of gate arrays; NOT a gate chain itself.

name.description: Reviewer identifier (matches a registered agent or built-in dispatcher).

blocking.description: If true, below-threshold or errored verdicts fail the gate.

threshold.description: Minimum score (0-100) required to satisfy a passing verdict.

trigger.description: Conditional trigger: only run when the change set matches the trigger. Either the legacy string form (`frontend`) or the structured `path-filter` object (SPEC-021-3-02).

enabled.description: If false, the resolver filters this entry out before scheduling. Operator workaround for trusted private forks.

timeout_ms.description: Per-reviewer subprocess wall-clock cap in milliseconds. See SPEC-REQ-000050. Overrides gate_defaults and defaults.timeout_ms for this reviewer only.
